summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact covered 20 of 40 listed PRs; all hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and independently useful or awaiting maintainer/author/proof work, so no close/merge/fix action is planned. The remaining 20 job refs were not present in the compacted hydrated item matrix, so they need human or applicator-side rehydration before classification.
